name: Literate Programming
description_en: Turn a codebase into a literate program—one markdown file that reads as documentation and tangles back into the original source code.
description_zh: 把代码库变成「文学化程序」——单个 markdown 文件既是面向人阅读的文档,又能 tangle 还原出原始源码。
long_en: Write a `.lit.md` file with named code chunks: WEAVE renders a PDF (prose, diagrams, math, highlighted code) via Pandoc, while TANGLE extracts the source files from root chunks.
long_zh: 用具名代码块编写 `.lit.md` 文件:WEAVE 经 Pandoc 渲染出含散文、图表、公式与高亮代码的 PDF,TANGLE 则从根代码块抽取出源文件。
sec_note_en: Runs Pandoc and tangles files locally; review generated code chunks before building.
sec_note_zh: 在本地运行 Pandoc 并 tangle 文件;构建前请审阅生成的代码块。
